G

GAME_FINAL - Static variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.utilities.AudioManager
Audio state constant for the final stage of a game session.
GAME_MIDDLE - Static variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.utilities.AudioManager
Audio state constant for the middle stage of a game session.
GAME_START - Static variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.utilities.AudioManager
Audio state constant for the early stage of a game session.
GAME_START_2 - Static variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.utilities.AudioManager
Audio state constant for the second phase of the game start.
GAME_VIEW - Static variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.PauseController
Path to the game screen FXML.
GAME_VIEW - Static variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.StartController
Classpath location of the game screen FXML resource.
GameController - Class in com.example.escriturarapida.controller
Main controller for the game screen.
GameController() - Constructor for class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.GameController
 
GameData - Class in com.example.escriturarapida.utilities
Utility class that holds shared game state across scenes.
GameData() - Constructor for class com.example.escriturarapida.utilities.GameData
 
gameModel - Variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.GameController
Game model accessed through the interface.
gameModel - Variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.PauseController
Game model accessed through the interface.
gameModel - Variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.GameModelAdapter
The adaptee instance containing the real game logic.
GameModel - Class in com.example.escriturarapida.model
Model class containing the core business logic of the game.
GameModel() - Constructor for class com.example.escriturarapida.model.GameModel
 
GameModelAdapter - Class in com.example.escriturarapida.model
Adapter class that wraps GameModel and implements IGameModel.
GameModelAdapter(GameModel) - Constructor for class com.example.escriturarapida.model.GameModelAdapter
Constructs a new adapter wrapping the given GameModel.
gameView - Variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.GameController
View handler responsible for scene transitions.
gameView - Variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.PauseController
View handler responsible for scene transitions.
gameView - Variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.StartController
View handler responsible for managing scene transitions between FXML views.
GameView - Class in com.example.escriturarapida.view
View class responsible for scene navigation in the game.
GameView() - Constructor for class com.example.escriturarapida.view.GameView
 
getRandomNegativeMessage() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.GameModel
Returns a randomly selected negative feedback message.
getRandomNegativeMessage() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.GameModelAdapter
Returns a randomly selected negative feedback message.
getRandomNegativeMessage() - Method in interface com.example.escriturarapida.model.IGameModel
Returns a randomly selected negative feedback message.
getRandomPositiveMessage() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.GameModel
Returns a randomly selected positive feedback message.
getRandomPositiveMessage() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.GameModelAdapter
Returns a randomly selected positive feedback message.
getRandomPositiveMessage() - Method in interface com.example.escriturarapida.model.IGameModel
Returns a randomly selected positive feedback message.
